title: Perinatal Mood and Anxiety Disorders Treatment - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Perinatal Mood and Anxiety Disorders Treatment 9 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Hispanic/Latino Community No Filter Hispanic/Latino Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details BALANCE CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES BILINGUAL MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides bilingual mental health services. Specialties include trauma, prenatal and postpartum depression and anxiety, at-risk adolescents, depression, anxiety, parenting support, acculturation, and immigration issues. 11740 SW Warner Avenue Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on Hispanic and Latinx communities Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 596-2222 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon MothersCare provides prenatal assessments to help women begin the path to prenatal care. Services include pregnancy testing, OHP application assistance, streamlined intake/referral for prenatal care, and dental care referrals. Specialized information and referral also available for WIC, home visitation programs, and other prenatal support services. The Perinatal Care Coordination program is able to provide individual case management during the prenatal and postpartum periods. Services include childbirth education, nurse home visiting, maternal mental health resources and counseling, and information and referral for community resources and infant care supplies. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Individuals needing prenatal or postpartum resources Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 322-7400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH DOWNTOWN HEALTH CENTER REDMOND OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon MothersCare provides prenatal assessments to help women begin the path to prenatal care. Specialized information and referral also available for WIC, home visitation programs, and other prenatal support services. The Perinatal Care Coordination program is able to provide individual case management during the prenatal and postpartum periods. evaluation and counseling services. Topics include perinatal and postpartum depression, stress related disorders, relationship and sexuality concerns, perinatal loss, and bereavement. 808 SW Campus Drive 7th Floor Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Women of all ages Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 418-4500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WFMC HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health services, including individual, group, family, and adolescent/youth counseling. Mental health providers specialize in helping patients who suffer from trauma, post-partum depression, substance abuse, developmental delays, and personality disorders.
